name: La Growth Machine

auth.notes: API key against https://apiv2.lagrowthmachine.com/flow. Official docs support Authorization: Bearer, x-api-key, and legacy apikey query parameter; headers are preferred.

rateLimits: 50 calls per 10 seconds per API key; excess requests return 429 Too Many Requests.
pagination: List endpoints use skip and limit parameters; documented campaign pagination defaults to limit 25 with a max of 25. Conversation messages use page.
notes: Official site links to a Postman API documentation collection and says full API documentation is available under account settings > Integrations & API.
Official site navigation labels MCP as coming soon; do not mark it available until a public first-party MCP install surface exists.
